class.name: ARBodyTrackingConfiguration
class.brief_description: Configuration for body tracking AR sessions.
class.description: Configures a session for full-body skeletal tracking. Use with [method ARSession.run_body_tracking]. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, [method is_supported] returns false and the configuration is inert.

method.name: is_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the current device supports ARKit body tracking.

members.member: When enabled, ARKit automatically estimates the body's skeleton scale.
When enabled, the camera may adjust focus automatically during tracking.
When enabled, ARKit produces [ARLightEstimate] data for each frame.
